reviews.comment:
Buen parador , que se llena en días de recambio turístico!, espacioso para descansar un poco bajo los árboles, dentro del local se amontona mucha gente antes de las cajas de pago( solo 2 en días de mucha concurrencia, baños bastante aceptable para la cantidad de personas que lo usan.

(Translated by Google)
Good rest stop, which gets crowded on days with tourist turnover! Spacious enough to rest a bit under the trees. Inside the premises, a lot of people crowd together before the checkout counters (only 2 on busy days). Bathrooms are quite acceptable for the number of people who use them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNReTdDTnB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una locura que un sanguche que solo es una feta de jamón y una de queso salga 9 mil pesos, RI DI CU LO
Además, sabiendo que es un fin de semana de carnaval no pueden tener solo dos trabajadores en la caja mínimamente esperamos más 30 minutos para comprar

(Translated by Google)
It's insane that a sandwich that's just a slice of ham and a slice of cheese costs 9,000 pesos, RIDICULOUS! Besides, knowing it's Carnival weekend, they can't only have two employees at the register; we waited at least 30 minutes to buy anything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRb1lpSzJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo a la mano y es YPF que decir es excelencia en servicio y calidad, el lugar tiene mucho lugar para distenderse

(Translated by Google)
Everything is within easy reach, and it's YPF, which means excellent service and quality; the place has plenty of room to relax.
